articles.title: $1.90 chicken rice stall in AMK 'no plans to raise prices', says customers mostly elderly
articles.summary: 📰 교통 관련 뉴스\n📢 $1.90 chicken rice stall in AMK 'no plans to raise prices', ...
articles.content: Fuel costs to transport ingredients have also gone up from $500 to up to $900 per month. However, they also have a central kitchen and direct chicken supply, which helps them control costs. "The residents around our shop are mainly elderly, and they make up more than half of our customers
